data_source: Alpaca real market data via qfa backtest (no --data-csv)
divergent_child_idea: AR-005-D1 mega-cap tech intraday overnight-gap reversal using open-to-close residuals.

notes: model.py implements rolling log-price residual pair mean reversion over the AR-005 mega-cap tech universe.
No trading or daemon path was invoked.

orthogonality.reason: No accepted alpha return-stream library was used in this pass.

qfa_command: set -a; source /Users/moonk/.hermes/profiles/alphaaoi/secrets/alpaca.env; set +a; export ALPACA_API_KEY="${ALPACA_API_KEY:-${ALPACA_KEY_ID:-}}"; export ALPACA_PAPER=true; uv run --with-editable . qfa backtest run /Users/moonk/quant-for-agent/models/pairs-residual-megacap-tech-5d-v1/model.py --symbols AAPL,MSFT,NVDA,AMZN,META,GOOGL --start 2024-01-01 --end 2025-12-31 --timeframe 1Day --initial-cash 100000 --db /Users/moonk/quant-for-agent/models/pairs-residual-megacap-tech-5d-v1/evaluations/qfa_realdata.sqlite
refinement_child_idea: AR-005-R1 adaptive pair selection with rolling correlation/ADF filters and turnover/cost gate.
warnings: Metrics are pre-cost because current qfa backtest CLI has no costs/slippage parameter.
qfa created sqlite artifact evaluations/qfa_realdata.sqlite under the model folder.
Backtest starts with a warmup period with zero exposure until enough historical observations are available inside the requested window.
db_retention_note: SQLite DB artifact removed before commit per alpha-model-management large artifact policy; compact JSON/Markdown summaries retained.
